response: To pause your HackerRank subscription, you need to follow these steps: Access Subscription Settings, click on the profile icon, select Settings, navigate to the Billing section, click the Cancel Plan button, select the desired pause duration (1 to 12 months), and confirm the pause. issue: one of my employee has left. I want to remove them from our hackerrank hiring account
subject: Employee leaving the company
response: To remove an employee from your HackerRank hiring account, you need to delete the team they are part of. Here are the steps to delete a team: 1. Log in to your HackerRank for Work account using your credentials. 2. Select your profile icon in the upper-right corner. 3. Select Teams Management from the drop-down menu. 4. Go to the Teams tab. 5. Select the team you want to delete. 6. Click the delete icon. 7. In the confirmation dialog, click Delete Team to confirm and complete the process.

issue: i am in US Virgin Islands and the merchant is saying i have to spend minimum 10$ on my VISA card, why so?
subject: Visa card minimum spend
response: In the US Virgin Islands, a merchant may require a minimum transaction amount of US$10 for credit card transactions. This is an exception that applies in the USA and US territories. If you encounter issues with a merchant requiring a minimum amount on a Visa debit card or a credit card purchase greater than US$10, you should notify your Visa card issuer.
